description_long: This is a classic stone drinking fountain with a square pedestal base and a single round basin at mid-height. The fountain features a spout above the basin, with a drain hole visible in the center of the bowl. The upper section of the pedestal displays engraved text, likely commemorative or dedicatory, and is topped with a decorative cap. The structure is set on a square concrete plinth, surrounded by fallen leaves, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting. The stone surface shows signs of weathering, and the overall design is utilitarian with subtle ornamental touches.
description: A weathered stone drinking fountain with a round basin, engraved pedestal, and decorative cap, set on a square concrete base amidst fallen leaves.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout above the basin, the engraved pedestal, and the square base with scattered leaves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the engraved text on the pedestal and the full circular basin profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the pedestal and basin, with more visible weathering and leaf accumulation.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying additional engraved text and the basin from a different angle.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain features engraved text panels on two sides of the pedestal, with a decorative cap at the top. The design is simple and functional, with subtle classical influences in the pedestal's proportions and cap.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is a single, round, shallow bowl with a slightly raised rim and a central drain. It is supported by the square pedestal and projects outward for easy access.
attribute_surrounding_landscaping: No visible surrounding landscaping; the fountain is set on a square concrete plinth with scattered fallen leaves.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: There is a single spout above the basin, oriented downward for drinking; no visible jets or decorative spray patterns are present.
